title: The Many Faces of Enderman
description: This mod adds (6) New enderman variants
body:
![many enderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0ac4a2544a103304a3fc91521bfb804a2ce3af8.png)
**🌌 The Many Faces of Enderman**

Do you dare to face the unknown?

The classic Enderman is a familiar face in the world of Minecraft, but what if the void held more than just those purple-eyed giants? The Many Faces of Enderman breathes new life—and a fair share of fright—into your world by adding 6 unique and terrifying Enderman variants, each with its own personality, look, and challenge.

Whether you are exploring deep caves, trekking through the Nether, or surviving the night, these new entities will make sure you never look at the shadows the same way again.

**🧬 Meet the Variants**

This mod introduces six brand-new creatures to your game:

💀 Skeleton Enderman: A bone-chilling fusion of skeletal remains and teleportation abilities.

🔥 Lava Enderman: Forged in the heat of the underworld; be careful not to get too close!

🌑 Void & Voided Enderman: Entities that seem to be made of the very essence of the "nothingness" between worlds.

👁️ Enderstalker: They don't just teleport; they watch from the shadows... and they follow.

🖤 Enderwitherman: A dark crossbreed that appears to channel the destructive power of the Wither.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🛠️ Technical Information**

Mod Loader: NeoForge



Versions: Supported for Minecraft 1.21.x (Check the 'Files' tab for the latest builds).

Developed by: SmartStreamLabs

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
